title: `Amorah #6017
definition:
Gomorrah = "submersion"

 1) the twin-city in evil with Sodom, both destroyed in judgment by
    God with fire from heaven
    1a) of iniquity (fig.)
nasbUsage:
Definition: Gomorrah = "submersion"

 1) the twin-city in evil with Sodom, both destroyed in judgment by
    God with fire from heaven
    1a) of iniquity (fig.)

    NASB:  a city in the Jordan Valley
